title: ayenia euphrasiifolia subsp. litoralis
intro: Ayenia euphrasiifolia subsp. litoralis, also known as sea ayenia, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae, native to the coastal areas of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Ayenia euphrasiifolia subsp. litoralis lie in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and even exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being and protection against oxidative stress. Ayenia euphrasiifolia subsp. litoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and dosages.
